title: Ethereal Wilds
description: A mod that adds a new dimension, along with a few new mobs and items.
body:
# Ethereal Wilds
A cool mod with a new custom dimension(Coming soon: actual biomes for it) and a few new mobs and items!

## Features:

- Cool new sword!
- New neutral mobs that attack monsters by default, which you can befriend with fish.
- New dimension with weird worldgen and custom biomes!
- Two new wood types!


This mod is also compatible with Tinker's Construct and Create, though currently there are only minor interactions with them.
